name: Metabolism
description: Metabolism process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.

graph TD

V2 --> X2[Metabolism Analysis]
W2 --> Y2[Metabolism Final Result]
X2 --> Z2[Metabolism Process Complete]
